request.description: Authenticates and returns a Bearer JWT token valid for 12 hours. Token is auto-saved for all other requests.
Creates a new device fitment order. Returns order_tracking_id, ais140_ticket_no, and mining_ticket_no per vehicle.
Returns stage-wise tracking info (ORDER_CREATED, TCU_SHIPPED, TCU_DELIVERED, DEVICE_INSTALLED etc.) with timestamps and metadata. Replace trackingId with value from Order Creation response.
Updates the SPOC (Single Point of Contact) for a fitment order. Replace tracking_id with the value from Order Creation.

body.raw:
[
  {
    "vehicle_details": {
      "vin": "MA3EXXBV4MW100001",
      "iccid": "89914902991803445854",
      "device_imei": "867584047854212",
      "device_make": "Vendor TCU",
      "device_model": "LAF 4G CAN",
      "engine_no": "ENGINE123456",
      "reg_number": "MH12AB1234",
      "rto_office_code": "MH01",
      "rto_state": "MH",
      "sim_expiry_date": "2026-01-20",
      "vehicle_model": "TATA LPT 2518",
      "mfg_year": "2024",
      "certificate_validity_duration_in_year": 2
    },
    "customer_details": {
      "name": "ABC Fleet Solutions Pvt Ltd",
      "address": "Plot No 123, Industrial Area",
      "city": "Mumbai",
      "pincode": "400001",
      "district": "Mumbai",
      "state": "Maharashtra",
      "mobile_no": "9876543210"
    }
  }
]

request.description: Creates AIS140 certification ticket(s) per VIN. If VIN already exists in an order, uses the same tracking_id (Case 2). Otherwise generates a new tracking_id (Case 1).

request.description: Creates Mining certification ticket(s) per VIN. Same tracking ID logic as AIS140.
